summary: A recorded Fox News 'The Faulkner Focus' segment with network chyrons covering a Maryland van-ramming incident and a rise in attacks on federal agents, including a split-screen interview with ICE Deputy Director Madison Sheahan and FBI scene b-roll. It is a TV news broadcast clip, not produced youth-appeal entertainment.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / LIVE / THE FAULKNER FOCUS
MD: ICE FIRES AT ALIEN DRIVER TRYING TO HIT AGENTS
ATTACKS ON FEDERAL AGENTS ON THE RISE
